name: maxrects-packer
description: WASM-accelerated 2D bin packer with WebWorker parallelism

scripts.build: rollup -c && tsc --emitDeclarationOnly --declaration --outDir ../../lib && mv ../../lib/index.d.ts ../../lib/maxrects-packer.d.ts && mv ../../lib/worker.d.ts ../../lib/maxrects-packer.worker.d.ts && cp src/wasm_glue.d.ts ../../lib/wasm_glue.d.ts
